heroTitle: Don’t waste time in the city
heroDescription: Find empty parking spots, reserve in advance, and pay via mobile — all on one platform.
feature1Description: See the nearest empty parking spots live.
feature2Description: Book your spot in 2 clicks, save time.
feature3Description: Pay in seconds via card or app.
ctaHeader: Spend your time living, not looking for parking
ctaDescription: With UniParque, parking problems are history
hiwStep1Description: Select the nearest empty parking spot on the map
hiwStep2Description: Reserve your spot with one click so no one else takes it
hiwStep3Description: Arrive and park comfortably without wasting time
appHeader: Everything is easier with the mobile app
appDescription: With the UniParque app, see parking spots in real-time, reserve, and pay — all from your pocket.
testimonial1Text: I no longer waste time searching for parking. Amazing!
testimonial2Text: Such an app is much needed in Baku. Very convenient.
testimonial3Text: UI/UX is excellent, very easy to use.

hero.title: Smart Parking. Smarter Cities.
hero.desc: Launched in 2026, our platform is designed to solve one of the most common urban challenges — finding a parking space quickly and easily.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.desc: In modern cities, finding parking is time-consuming and stressful. Drivers often spend valuable time searching for available spots, increasing fuel consumption and contributing to traffic congestion.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.desc: Our platform allows users to view available parking spots in real-time, make reservations instantly, and manage their bookings with ease. The system is fast, intuitive, and built with user experience in mind.

realTimeReservations.title: Real-time Reservations
realTimeReservations.desc: Instantly find and reserve available parking spots

smartManagement.title: Smart Management
smartManagement.desc: Easily manage and track your reservations

multipleLocations.title: Multiple Locations
multipleLocations.desc: Choose from different branches and sections

secureSystem.title: Secure System
secureSystem.desc: Your data is protected and handled safely

cta.title: Experience the Future of Parking 🚀
cta.desc: Reserve your spot now and save time every day.

profile.lastnameMin: Lastname must have at least 2 characters

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters long
changePassword.requirements: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 decimal
